final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic illustrating the step-by-step deployment of Hermes in a Docker container with GLMCodingPlan integration (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a technical documentation aesthetic — references in the spirit of GitHub README visual guides, Docker official documentation illustrations, modern DevOps diagramming conventions; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 4-step sequential layout with clear numbering (1-2-3-4), each step as a distinct visual panel
Subject: must include Docker container iconography, Hermes deployment elements, GLMCodingPlan integration markers, command-line snippets
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a clean technical direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" with Chinese step titles and command examples
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 4 sequential steps clearly numbered; must show Docker container context and Hermes + GLMCodingPlan integration
Avoid:
